headline: Super vs ChatGPT — Personal AI Agents for Real Computer Work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs ChatGPT. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs ChatGPT

summary: ChatGPT is a world‑class conversational assistant evolving toward automation and agents. Super is built for people who want a personal AI agent that actually operates a computer — and reuses a computer-use cache so repeated workflows get faster and cheaper over time. This page fairly compares what ChatGPT is best at today, where its new Scheduled Tasks fit, and why Super is the sharper alternative for durable, repeated computer-use work.
